problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
